content.json:
# 🛡️ Perimeter Breach Detection
---
Correlates firewall allow/deny events with downstream web server activity to detect confirmed perimeter breaches. A firewall allow followed by web exploit attempts or error spikes from the same source IP is a confirmed breach — not just a noisy alert.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    Allowed = countif(DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')),
    Denied = countif(DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')),
    UniqueSourceIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    UniqueVendors = dcount(DeviceVendor)
| project TotalEvents, Allowed, Denied, UniqueSourceIPs, UniqueVendors
content.title: Firewall traffic summary

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), DeviceAction
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow', 'deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Allow vs deny trend

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| summarize DenyCount = count() by SourceIP
| sort by DenyCount desc
| take 10
content.title: Top denied source IPs

content.json: ## 🔴 Breach Candidates — Firewall Allow → Web Attack

content.query:
let AllowedIPs = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize AllowCount = count(), LastAllowed = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceIP;
let WebAttacks = W3CIISLog
| where scStatus startswith '4' or scStatus startswith '5'
| where isnotempty(cIP)
| summarize WebErrors = count(), LastError = max(TimeGenerated), URIs = make_set(csUriStem, 5) by cIP;
AllowedIPs
| join kind=inner (
    WebAttacks | project SourceIP = cIP, WebErrors, LastError, URIs
) on SourceIP
| project SourceIP, AllowCount, LastAllowed, WebErrors, LastError, URIs
| sort by WebErrors desc
content.title: IPs allowed through firewall that then generated web server errors — breach candidates

content.query:
let AllowedIPs = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize by SourceIP;
W3CIISLog
| where isnotempty(cIP)
| join kind=inner (AllowedIPs | project cIP = SourceIP) on cIP
| where csUriStem has_any ('../', '.php?', 'cmd=', 'exec=', 'passwd', 'etc/passwd', 'select+', 'union+', '<script', 'eval(', 'base64')
| project TimeGenerated, cIP, csMethod, csUriStem, csUriQuery, scStatus, csUserAgent, Computer
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Web exploit attempts from firewall-allowed IPs

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort)
| summarize AllowCount = count() by DestinationPort, ApplicationProtocol
| sort by AllowCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Top allowed destination ports & protocols

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('deny', 'block', 'drop', 'DROP', 'Deny', 'Block')
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort)
| summarize DenyCount = count() by DestinationPort, ApplicationProtocol
| sort by DenyCount desc
| take 15
content.title: Top denied destination ports & protocols

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'permit', 'accept', 'ACCEPT', 'Allow')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize AllowCount = count() by SourceIP
| sort by AllowCount desc
| take 20
content.title: Most active allowed source IPs
